channel.title: Comments on: Avery Brewing: duganA Double India Pale Ale, Ep. 116
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Sharron Clemons
item.dc:creator: Sharron Clemons
item.description: Looks like I'll have to try this one as well!
item.content:encoded: Looks like I’ll have to try this one as well!

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Excellent point Paul! If you've seen the show, then you would know that's kind of what we do, we're loose and we really don't know everything about every beer, we try to break it all down as we do it, and try to have fun at the same time. There is nothing more boring to me then a know it all beer blogger telling me what I should like and how my pallet will handle a particular beer - we try to be more entertaining.
Now as far as experience, John is a brewer and on the BA, David is a beer distributor, and I've been telling the craft beer story for several years.
Check back soon as you will see a familiar face on a beer show pilot I shot in 2003.
I do appreciate you candid comments and I appreciate even more you taking the time to watch the video!
Paul
item.content:encoded:
Excellent point Paul! If you’ve seen the show, then you would know that’s kind of what we do, we’re loose and we really don’t know everything about every beer, we try to break it all down as we do it, and try to have fun at the same time. There is nothing more boring to me then a know it all beer blogger telling me what I should like and how my pallet will handle a particular beer – we try to be more entertaining.

Now as far as experience, John is a brewer and on the BA, David is a beer distributor, and I’ve been telling the craft beer story for several years.

Check back soon as you will see a familiar face on a beer show pilot I shot in 2003.

I do appreciate you candid comments and I appreciate even more you taking the time to watch the video!

Paul

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: Great beer, but do your homework! If you are reading the label to find out how it is described, calling about how it is pronounced, and don't know what hops are in it, I can't trust you to be able to describe the beer as accurately as possible!
item.content:encoded: Great beer, but do your homework! If you are reading the label to find out how it is described, calling about how it is pronounced, and don’t know what hops are in it, I can’t trust you to be able to describe the beer as accurately as possible!

item.title: By: Steven
item.dc:creator: Steven
item.description: Just in case if you were wondering it's pronounced Dugan A lol
item.content:encoded: Just in case if you were wondering it’s pronounced Dugan A lol

item.title: By: TucsonTom
item.dc:creator: TucsonTom
item.description: Another excellent webcast, thank you very much. What I think makes your webcasts SOOO great is the balance of technical details and playfulness. Keep it up!
item.content:encoded: Another excellent webcast, thank you very much. What I think makes your webcasts SOOO great is the balance of technical details and playfulness. Keep it up!

item.title: By: Marco
item.dc:creator: Marco
item.description: Looks like I'll have to try this one as well!
item.content:encoded: Looks like I’ll have to try this one as well!
